data.body: Full suite on 4-change base GREEN: 5942 passed, 44 skipped, exit 0. PUSHED 4-change stack to Gerrit (relation chain): 653=c366, 654=28f1, 655=4cdf, 656=7ed9 — CI/LLM-Review now running. d6bd remediated over 2 more rounds (v2 blocked E6/F1 escape-hatch + G6 baseline_shadow dual-purpose; v3 PASS signed) and CLAIMED. Key design intel folded into d6bd plan: baseline_shadow.run_dual_write_shadow does set_baseline ADVANCEMENT (keep, extract to _advance_baselines, call unconditionally) + equivalence-check (dead, delete); cold-start emits RECON: baseline_cold_start stderr + doc; AC6 requires real before/after dry-run zero-diff (no escape hatch). Dispatching d6bd implementation now.
